product.product_name: Cello C50WS4K 50" inch Smart WiFi WebOS 4K Ultra HD TV Freeview Play FRAMELESS
product.description:
BRAND NEW - CELLO C50WS4K Smart TV
MADE IN THE UK. FAST COURIER DELIVERY DIRECTLY FROM CELLO
3 YEAR CELLO WARRANTY APPLIES TO THIS ITEM

50″ Smart WebOS 4K Ultra HD TV with Freeview Play and Frameless Bezel


  • 50” 4K Ultra HD LED TV
  • LG’s Smart operating system, WebOS Hub built-in
  • Download apps through the web browser
  • Freeview HD by Aerial & also a Satellite tuner built-in with Freesat
  • Bluetooth connectivity (easily add a Bluetooth soundbar)
  • Freeview Play with 100 channels and 20,000 hours of free on-demand content
  • 3 x HDMI inputs for your external devices and consoles
  • Can be wall mounted (200mm x 100mm bracket & 4 pcs M5 X8 not included)


The built-in Smart platform, developed by LG, allows you to browse the web and download all your favourite entertainment apps, so you can stream directly to the TV. From Netflix, Prime Video and Disney Plus to YouTube and catch-up apps like BBC iPlayer and ITVx, a world of entertainment awaits.

With Freeview Play you can watch an impressive 60,000+ hours of TV and over 1,500 boxsets, across your favourite on-demand players. All for free.

With the built-in Bluetooth connectivity, you can add a Bluetooth soundbar to the TV. This means cinema sound can be enjoyed without the need for untidy cables. The built-in satellite tuner with Freesat provides access to over 170 channels with 100% channel coverage on a subscription-free basis. Plus, you’ll find your favourite on-demand players all in one place. You will just need to purchase and install your own satellite dish/cabling. The ultimate flat-screen TV with its super-slim bezel and lightweight design is ideal for wall mounting and easy maneuverability


Specification

Screen Size 50″
Freeview Play Yes
DVD Player No
USB Yes – playback only
Contrast Ratio 5000:1
Brightness 250
Max Resolution 3840 x 2160
Speakers 2 x 8W
Smart Yes
Max Power 120W
Energy Rating ‘G – 71 watts on working and 0.5 watt standby power consumption
HDMI 3
Inputs RF Antenna, HDMI X3, CVBS, USB x 2, RJ45
Outputs Digital Audio Out, Earphone Out
VESA 200mm x 100mm
Dimension w/stand W 1110 x H 733 x D 268 mm
Dimensions w/o stand W 1110 x H 644 x D 34 mm
Weight 9.1kg
product.category: Electronics & Technology > TV & Audio > Speakers & Sound Systems > CD Players

product.product_name: Coffee Machine Espresso Machine Coffee Maker Cappuccino Milk Frother 20 Bar 1.8L
product.description:
•
Product introduction：
✅ 20Bar High-Pressure Extraction
Equipped with a professional high-pressure water pump, it delivers a stable 20Bar extraction pressure to instantly penetrate coffee grounds, fully releasing the aroma and oils of coffee beans. It easily  restoring the rich flavor of authentic espresso—every sip rivals the quality of specialty café drinks.
✅ 1.8L Large-Capacity Removable Water Tank
No need for frequent refills; a full tank can make multiple cups for the whole family, easily handling daily use and small gatherings. The semi-transparent design lets you check water levels at a glance, and the detachable structure, paired with a separate drip tray, makes refilling and cleaning a breeze—saving time and effort.
✅ Food-Grade Stainless Steel Manufacturing
The body and core contact parts are made of food-grade stainless steel, which is corrosion-resistant, high-temperature resistant, and durable. It eliminates residual odors, ensuring every cup of coffee is pure and safe, balancing premium texture with practicality.
🛠️ All-Inclusive Accessories · Unlock Diverse Coffee Experiences
The machine comes with a complete set of professional accessories, so you can start your home barista journey right out of the box. It balances professionalism and convenience to suit 
☕ Scenario Adaptation · Perfect for Your Daily Moments
🌅 Morning Wake-Up: One-tap espresso, paired with milk for an energizing latte to chase away drowsiness and kickstart a productive day.
☕ Afternoon Relaxation: Brew a cup of freshly ground coffee with dessert, enjoying a moment of peaceful solitude and elevating your at-home ritual.
🥂 Friend Gatherings: Quick double-cup brewing and a variety of milk-based drinks let you host a cozy coffee party at home.
💼 Office Energy Boost: Fast capsule brewing eliminates waiting time, providing timely energy to enhance work efficiency.
📌 Product Specifications
Extraction Pressure: 20Bar high-pressure extraction
Water Tank Capacity: 1.8L large-capacity removable water tank

product.product_name: 11.5" Portable DVD Player with 9.5" Large HD Swivel Screen High Volume Speaker
product.description:
11.5" Portable DVD Player with 9.5" HD Swivel Screen, 5 Hrs Battery, Car Travel DVD Players for Kids & Elderly, Region Free, Support Sync TV/USB/SD Card/Earphone/Multiple Disc Formats

About this item
👨‍👩‍👧【Portable and Magical】-- Compact design makes it easy to carry out with you. Take it on your road trip and get double surprises both on and off the screen. portable DVD player can be easily swiveled as a tablet and mounted to the car headrest, brings tons of fun for your journey.
👨‍👩‍👧【5 Hrs Battery Life】-- Upgraded battery capacity to 2500mAh, you and your family can watch 1-2 movies without any worries. Our portable DVD player for car provide a certificated AC power adapter and car charger in the package, no more worries about the battery dying out when you are out.
👨‍👩‍👧【Protective and Gorgeous Screen】-- portable DVD player for kids adopts the HD Eye-protective Screen, and refuses the recycled screen, aiming at alleviating eye fatigue caused by the long use, more comfortable and protective screen for your kids’ eyes.
👨‍👩‍👧【All Regions & Multi Formats】-- Supports CD,DVD,VCD,SVCD,CD±R/±RW,DVD±R/±RW from all region (Blu-ray and pirated discs are not supported); DVD player portable also support multi-media files via USB and SD Card (16-32GB), such as VOB, AVI, MPEG, MP3, WMA, JPEG.
👨‍👩‍👧【Dual Speakers & Clear Sound】-- Portable dvd player with screen equipped with two high-power speakers, which makes the volume louder. There is a 3.5mm earphone jack on the right side of the portable dvd players so that you can get a concentrated and clearer sound for your private viewing.
👨‍👩‍👧【Easy Operation & Seamless Viewing】-- DVD player has a simple operating system and a convenient remote control, making it an ideal companion for the kids and elderly. Never miss out on exciting plots, the Break-point memory function can ensure seamless connection of the plot.
👨‍👩‍👧【Premium Service & Quick Response】-- We are committed to providing the best after-sales service to our customers. If you have any questions, concerns, or issues with the your device, we are here to help you 24 hours a day.

★Eye-protection LCD screen★: DVD player provide a 800*480 Swivel Screen with 270 degrees rotation and 180 degrees flip. The portable player can be swiveled as a tablet to attache to the car backseat to play.
★Super High Battery★: Upgrade battery capacity to 2 times as the original ones, ensures the 5 hours play time. Not enough? Free car charger provided in the package.
★Resume Play★: Support break-point memory function, make it possible to start from where you left at last time, no need to start again.
★Game Player★: This DVD player is more than a DVD player, we provide a free game controller in our package, kids also can use this to play 180 kinds of retro games, such as super Mario etc. Note: customer need do download game cd by yourself.
★Multi-Media★: Directly play in formats: CD, DVD, CD-R/RW, DVD-R/+R, DVD+RW/-RW, VCD, SVCD; USB and SD Card supported: MP3/WMA/WAV, JPEG, MPEG2/AVI, TXT.


The new version of portable DVD player.
3 years in portable DVD player make us understand your needs better and make prodcuts more better.

Your Home Cinema always with You:
Our Portable DVD Player has a built-in USB port that allows you to enjoy your favorite movies while travelling, camping, sightseeing,you can also copy your CD files to USB or SD card.
Improved battery:
Improved 2000mAh Lithium battery extend the play time to 5 hours,even the adapter was left at home,do not need to worry about losing battery power whilst watching a movie.

Break Point memory:
Break Point memory function make it possible to start from where you end at last time.
Sync to your TV Screen:
With the included AV cable, it's available to transmit the screen from DVD player to your TV to enjoy a bigger and clearer screen.
Fantastic Swivel Screen: portable DVD player with 9.5 inch 270° rotation and 180° flip screen make it possible to attach to the car headrest and make you enjoy your time when you are on boring road trip.

Package Including:
1x Portable DVD player
1x AV cable
1x Remote controller
1x Power adapter
1x Car charger
1x User manual

product.product_name: Bluetooth FM Transmitter Car Kit MP3 Player USB Charger Handsfree Adapter UK
product.description:
🚗 Car Charger Bluetooth FM Transmitter Adapter – Fast Charger BT 5.0 with USB & MP3 Player


Upgrade your driving experience with this multifunctional Car Charger Bluetooth adapter. Combining hands-free calling, music streaming, and rapid charging, it’s the perfect companion for every journey. Designed with Fast Charger BT 5.0 technology, it delivers high-speed charging while keeping your devices connected safely.


⭐ Key Features

  • Bluetooth 5.0 Connectivity: Stable, fast pairing with smartphones for calls, music, and navigation audio.
  • FM Transmitter Function: Stream your favorite playlists directly to your car stereo via FM radio.
  • Dual USB Fast Charging Ports: Supports rapid charging for multiple devices simultaneously.
  • MP3 Player Support: Play music from USB drives or SD cards effortlessly.
  • Hands-Free Calling: Clear audio with built-in microphone ensures safe driving.
  • Compact & Universal Design: Fits all standard car cigarette lighter sockets and works with most vehicles.


📊 Technical Specs

  • Bluetooth Version: 5.0
  • Input: DC 12-24V
  • Output: 5V/2.4A per USB port
  • Frequency Range: 87.5–108MHz
  • Compatible Formats: MP3/WMA/WAV
  • LED Display: Shows FM frequency and device info


💡 Benefits

  • Charge your phone and other devices quickly with Fast Charger BT 5.0 technology.
  • Enjoy seamless music streaming without tangled wires.
  • Stay safe with hands-free calling while driving.
  • Compact design keeps your dashboard neat and organized.


🎯 Ideal For

  • Daily commuters who need fast device charging and music on the go.
  • Road trips and long drives requiring hands-free calls and entertainment.
  • Anyone who wants to upgrade an older car stereo to Bluetooth functionality.
  • Drivers with multiple devices needing simultaneous fast charging.


🌐 Vast Applications

  • Cars, SUVs, trucks, and other vehicles with cigarette lighter sockets.
  • Listening to music or podcasts from smartphones, USB drives, or SD cards.
  • Hands-free calls during work commutes, rideshare driving, or family trips.
  • Charging smartphones, tablets, GPS devices, power banks, and other USB devices.
  • Enhancing older car stereos with FM broadcasting and Bluetooth connectivity.

📦 Free Shipping ✔ Fast & reliable delivery ✔ No hidden charges

🔁 30-Day Returns ✔ Buy with confidence ✔ Full refund if you’re not satisfied


Make every drive safer, smarter, and more enjoyable with this Car Charger Bluetooth FM Transmitter Adapter – a must-have for modern drivers.

product.product_name: Juicer Lemon Squeezer Citrus Juice Hand Held Stainless Steel Fruit Orange
product.description:
🍋 Lemon Squeezer Handheld Stainless Steel – Easy Citrus Juicer 🍋

Get the Perfect Squeeze every time with this durable and easy-to-use handheld lemon squeezer. Designed for efficiency and comfort, this premium citrus juicer helps you extract maximum juice with minimal effort—no seeds, no mess!

⭐ Key Features

  • Perfect Squeeze Technology – Extracts maximum juice with minimal effort
  • Durable Stainless Steel Build – Rust-resistant and long-lasting
  • Ergonomic Handle Design – Comfortable grip for easy squeezing
  • No Seeds, No Mess – Built-in filter keeps juice smooth
  • Easy to Clean – Dishwasher safe and quick rinse cleaning
  • Used for Variety of Fruits – Ideal for lemons, limes, and small oranges

📐 Technical Specifications

  • Material: Premium Stainless Steel
  • Type: Handheld Manual Juicer
  • Color: Silver
  • Size: Compact & portable
  • Weight: Lightweight yet durable
  • Cleaning: Dishwasher safe

💡 Benefits

Installation method on the reflector

Installation method of rearview mirror

2. Insert one end of the insert provided with the product onto the product, then tear off the double-sided adhesive protective layer on the other end and stick it to the desired installation area

Cyperus Rotundus Oil 60ml For Hair Removal Reducing Body Hair Growth


Features:
1. Gentle Plant-Based Formula for Smooth and Caring Hair Removal

Infused with selected botanical extracts and modern skincare technology, this formula gently softens body hair and relaxes follicles for a smoother removal process. It significantly minimizes discomfort and physical irritation, offering a delicate and skin-friendly experience that cares for your sensitive skin.

2. Purify and Prep Skin to Prevent Irritation

The product cleanses and purifies the skin’s surface, helping to unclog hair follicles before hair removal. By reducing the risk of clogged pores, it prevents common issues like red spots and ingrown hairs—leaving your skin cleaner, healthier, and prepped for a flawless experience.

3. Deep Hydration to Soothe and Restore Skin

After hair removal, skin often feels dry and sensitive. Enriched with natural moisturizing ingredients, our product penetrates deeply to replenish moisture, calm irritation, and relieve tightness. It helps restore a hydrated, smooth texture—so you can say goodbye to post-wax dryness and roughness.

4. Daily Care for Long-Term Silky Skin

More than just a hair removal aid, it’s also a daily skincare essential. With regular use, it helps maintain follicle health, resulting in finer, softer, and sparser regrowth over time. Meanwhile, the nutrient-rich formula continuously nourishes the skin, improving its texture, elasticity, and overall radiance day by day.

How to use:

1. Before use, please thoroughly clean the area that needs hair removal and ensure that the skin is in a completely dry state.

2. Take an appropriate amount of essential oil in the palm of your hand, apply it evenly to the target area, and gently massage with fingertips in circular motions for 2-3 minutes until the skin feels slightly warm. This step can help essential oils penetrate, fully soften hair roots, moisturize surrounding skin, and prepare for hair removal.

3. When performing physical hair removal operations such as scraping or using hair removal devices, the lubricating layer formed by essential oils can effectively reduce the irritation caused by scraping. After depilation, a small amount of essential oil can be taken again and gently applied to the depilated area to soothe the skin, instantly hydrate, and relieve possible burning or dryness.

4. As a daily care, a small amount of essential oil can be taken and massaged on the desired area until absorbed. Long term use can continuously moisturize the skin, inhibit hair growth rate, make newly formed hair soft and fine, and help develop a long-lasting smooth and delicate skin feel.


Notice:

* Please store in a cool place to avoid high temperature and direct sunlight.

* Please keep this product out of the reach of  children.

* Actual color May be slightly different from the image due to different monitor and light effect.

* Please allow 1-3cm deviation due to manual measurement.

🔥 PRODUCT DESCRIPTION

Restore clarity, brightness, and safety to your vehicle’s headlights with this professional-grade Headlight Restoration Kit. Designed to effectively remove oxidation, yellowing, haze, and light scratches, this powerful scratch remover and oxidation cleaner helps improve night-time visibility and enhances your car’s appearance — without costly replacements.

Ideal for MOT preparation, older cars, foggy lenses, or simply giving your vehicle a fresh look. Achieve professional results at home in minutes – no expensive tools or garage fees required.

  • 🔹 Powerful Scratch Remover & Oxidation Formula – Eliminates yellowing, haze, light scratches & UV damage

  • 🔹 Easy DIY Application – No professional tools required – hand polish application
  • 🔹 Long-Lasting Protection – Helps prevent future oxidation and fading
  • 🔹 UK Stock – Fast Dispatch – No waiting for international shipping

🔧 TECHNICAL SPECIFICATIONS

Product TypeHeadlight Restoration Kit – Polish & Scratch Remover
FunctionPolish, Scratch Remover, Oxidation Cleaner, UV Protection
Suitable ForPlastic headlight lenses (polycarbonate)
Application MethodManual / Hand Polish – no machine required
CompatibilityUniversal – Cars, Vans, SUVs, Motorbikes, Caravans, Trailers
ConditionBrand New 

🔄 VAST APPLICATIONS

  • ✔ Headlights – Restores clarity and brightness
  • ✔ Tail lights & indicator lenses – Removes dullness and oxidation
  • ✔ Fog lights – Improves light output and visibility
  • ✔ Plastic trim & clear plastic covers – Revives faded surfaces
  • ✔ Motorbike light covers – Restores shine and transparency
  • ✔ Caravan & trailer light lenses – Enhances road safety

🎯 IDEAL FOR

  • 🚗 Foggy, yellowed, or oxidised headlights
  • 🛠️ Vehicles preparing for MOT tests (improved light output)
  • 🔧 Older cars with faded, cloudy lenses
  • ✨ Removing light scratches and surface haze
  • 🧼 DIY car maintenance at home – no garage needed
  • 🌙 Improving night-time driving safety

🌟 WHY CUSTOMERS RECOMMEND IT

  • ✔ Noticeable Results – Visibly clearer, brighter lights after one application
  • ✔ Easy to Use – Straightforward application with quick results (10-15 minutes per side)
  • ✔ Cost-Effective Solution – Saves £200+ compared to replacement headlights
  • ✔ Durable Finish – Helps maintain clarity for months with proper care
  • ✔ Professional Results at Home – Workshop-quality restoration without the cost

🛠️ HOW TO USE (Simple Steps)

  1. Clean headlights with soap and water, then dry.
  2. Apply restoration compound to the included applicator pad.
  3. Rub onto the headlight in circular motions for 2-3 minutes.
  4. Wipe off residue with a clean microfiber cloth.
  5. Repeat if necessary for severely oxidised lenses.
  6. (Optional) Apply UV sealant for long-lasting protection.

Pro tip: For best results, mask off surrounding paintwork with tape before starting.

✅ KEY BENEFITS

  • 💰 Save money compared to replacing headlights
  • ✨ Enhance vehicle appearance instantly
  • 📋 Improve MOT readiness (clearer beam pattern)
  • 🛡️ Increase road safety with brighter headlights
  • ⏱️ Quick and effective results at home (under 30 minutes total)

📌 IMPORTANT NOTES

  • ⚠ For plastic (polycarbonate) headlights only – not suitable for glass lenses
  • ⚠ Deep scratches or internal lens clouding may require professional replacement
  • ⚠ Apply UV protection after restoration to prevent rapid re-oxidation
  • ⚠ Test on a small area first if headlights have aftermarket coatings
  • ⚠ Avoid contact with painted surfaces – mask off if needed

🚚 UK SHIPPING & RETURNS

🌍 VAST APPLICATIONS

  • 🏠 Living Rooms & Bedrooms – Perfect for main or secondary televisions
  • 🏢 Apartments & Rental Homes – Ideal where satellite dishes or outdoor antennas are not allowed
  • 🚐 Caravans & Motorhomes – Great for watching TV while travelling or camping
  • 🎓 Student Accommodation – A simple and affordable way to access free channels

  • 🚐 Travellers needing a portable TV signal solution

🛠️ HOW TO SET UP

  1. Connect the aerial cable to your TV's antenna input (RF port).
  2. Plug the built-in signal booster into a USB port on your TV or a USB mains adaptor (if required).
  3. Place the aerial near a window or in an elevated position for best reception.
  4. Run a channel scan on your TV (set to DTV / Air / Antenna mode).
  5. Adjust the aerial position if needed and re-scan for optimal channel list.

📌 IMPORTANT NOTES

  • ⚠ Reception range (250 miles) is a maximum theoretical specification – actual performance depends on local transmitter distance, obstacles, and interference.
  • ⚠ Some newer TV models may require the USB booster for power – if your TV has no USB port, use a standard USB mains plug (not included).
  • ⚠ Not suitable for analogue TVs – requires DVB-T / Freeview compatible digital TV.
  • ⚠ For best results, position the aerial as high as possible and away from metal objects or large electronics.

🌍 VAST APPLICATIONS & MULTIPLE USES

This versatile bidet spray tap is designed for a wide range of everyday uses:

  • 🧼 Personal hygiene and toilet cleaning
  • 🕌 Muslim ablution (wudu) preparation
  • 👶 Washing baby cloth nappies / diapers
  • 🚽 Cleaning the toilet bowl and bathroom floor
  • 🔄 Rinsing reusable sanitary products
  • 🐕 Pet bathing and washing small animals
  • 💧  Filling buckets or cleaning containers
  • 👟 Washing muddy shoes or slippers
  • 🌿 Balcony or garden rinsing tasks
  • 🧹 General household cleaning where controlled water spray is needed

🏆 WHY THIS BIDET SPRAY TAP IS BETTER THAN OTHERS

  • ✔ Stronger & Controlled Water Pressure – Efficient cleaning without excessive water usage.
  • ✔ High-Quality Chrome Finish – More durable and rust‑resistant compared to standard plastic sprayers.
  • ✔ Ergonomic Trigger Design – Smooth press handle offers better control and comfortable use.
  • ✔ Multi-Purpose Functionality – Ideal for hygiene and many cleaning tasks around the home.
  • ✔ Durable Hose Construction – Reinforced hose prevents leaks, cracks, and wear over time.
  • ✔ Easy Universal Installation – Compatible with most standard bathroom plumbing fittings (½" BSP).
  • ✔ Long-Lasting Performance – Built for everyday use with reliable and sturdy materials.

✅ BENEFITS

  • ✔ Eco‑friendly alternative to excessive toilet paper use

  • 👴 Elderly care and hygiene support (reduces bending and straining)
  • 🏨 Hotels, guest houses, and rental accommodations

🛠️ INSTALLATION TIPS

  1. Turn off the water supply to the toilet or tap.
  2. Use the included T‑adapter or connect directly to a spare ½" BSP outlet (e.g., bidet tap, washing machine valve).
  3. Screw the flexible hose onto the spray head and the water outlet.
  4. Mount the wall holder with screws or adhesive (provided) in a convenient position.
  5. Turn the water back on and check for leaks – tighten gently if needed.
  6. For best results, use a plumber’s tape (PTFE) on threaded connections to prevent leaks.

📌 IMPORTANT NOTES

  • ⚠ Check your existing water outlet – standard UK bathroom taps may require an adapter (not included if not standard). Most installations use a separate ½" threaded valve.
  • ⚠ Avoid using excessive force when tightening – hand‑tight plus a quarter turn with a wrench is sufficient.
  • ⚠ For cold water only unless connected to a mixer valve – this kit does not heat water.
  • ⚠ Colour may vary slightly due to monitor settings – chrome finish is bright silver as pictured.
  • ⚠ If the hose is too long, you can loop it neatly behind the toilet or mount the holder lower.

📦 PACKAGE INCLUDES

  • ✅ 1 × Chrome Bidet Spray Head (handheld)
  • ✅ 1 × Flexible Hose (approx. 1.2‑1.5m)

🔥 PRODUCT DESCRIPTION

Capture perfect photos and videos with this Adjustable Tripod Stand featuring a universal phone holder and Bluetooth remote. Designed for stability and flexibility, this tripod is ideal for photography, video recording, live streaming, TikTok, YouTube, video calls, and online meetings.

With 360° rotation and adjustable height from 33cm to 102cm, you can easily find the perfect shooting angle, whether at home, in the office, or outdoors. The included Bluetooth remote lets you take photos or start recording wirelessly from up to 10 metres away.

⭐ KEY FEATURES

  • 🔹 Adjustable Height – Extends from 33cm (13") to 102cm (40") – perfect for tabletop or floor use.
  • 🔹 360° Rotation Head – Panoramic rotation plus 180° tilt for landscape or portrait mode.
  • 🔹 Universal Phone Holder – Fits most smartphones, even with a case (width 2.16–3.93 inches).

  • 🔹 Strong & Stable – Supports up to 2KG (4.4lbs) – holds phones, action cameras, small digital cameras, and ring lights.

Product TypeMini Tripod Stand – Adjustable Floor/Table Tripod

Rotation360° Panoramic + 180° Tilt (portrait/landscape)

ColourBlack (as pictured)
ConnectivityBluetooth Remote 

🎯 IDEAL FOR

  • 📷 Photography – portraits, product shots, time‑lapse, long exposures
  • 🎥 Video recording – YouTube videos, tutorials, reviews, vlogs
  • 📱 TikTok & Instagram content – hands‑free shooting for reels and stories
  • 💻 Video calls & meetings – Zoom, Teams, Skype – stable hands‑free viewing
  • 🌍 Travel photography – lightweight, folds small for backpacks
  • 💡 Ring light setups – standard 1/4" mount fits most ring lights (sold separately)

🛠️ HOW TO USE

  1. Extend the tripod legs to your desired height and lock the clips.
  2. Attach the phone holder to the 1/4" screw (or use the built‑in holder if integrated).
  3. Place your phone in the holder and tighten securely.
  4. Pair the Bluetooth remote with your phone (search for "Shutter" or "Remote" in Bluetooth settings).
  5. Press the remote button to take photos or start/stop video recording.

Pro tip: Use the 360° rotation head to switch between landscape and portrait without moving the tripod legs.

💡 BENEFITS

  • ✔ Hands‑free shooting – perfect for group photos, selfies, and video calls.
  • ✔ Bluetooth remote works up to 10 metres (33 feet) – no need to touch the phone.
  • ✔ Lightweight and collapsible – fits easily into luggage or a backpack.
  • ✔ Compatible with iOS and Android – no app required for basic shutter function.
  • ✔ 1/4" screw mount works with most cameras, webcams, and ring lights.

📌 IMPORTANT NOTES

  • ⚠ Bluetooth remote requires one CR2032 battery (Not included). Remove the plastic tab before first use.
